data.name: About Face
data.oracle_text: Switch target creature's power and toughness until end of turn.
data.flavor_text: The overconfident are the most vulnerable.

data.name: Academic Dispute
data.oracle_text:
Target creature blocks this turn if able. You may have it gain reach until end of turn.
Learn. (You may reveal a Lesson card you own from outside the game and put it into your hand, or discard a card to draw a card.)
data.flavor_text: "I'll show you original research, you hack!"

data.name: Active Volcano
data.oracle_text:
Choose one —
• Destroy target blue permanent.
• Return target Island to its owner's hand.

data.name: A-Galvanic Discharge
data.oracle_text: Choose target creature or planeswalker. You get {E}{E}, then you may pay any amount of {E}. Galvanic Discharge deals that much damage to that permanent.

data.name: Artifact Blast
data.oracle_text: Counter target artifact spell.
data.flavor_text: The first line of defense against Urza and Mishra, the Artifact Blast achieved widespread fame until an unlucky mage discovered it was useless on the devices the brothers had already created.

data.name: Balduvian Rage
data.oracle_text:
Target attacking creature gets +X/+0 until end of turn.
Draw a card at the beginning of the next turn's upkeep.
data.flavor_text:
"Let your heartbeat be the thunder in the valley. Let your swords be the lightning on the peaks."
—Lothar Lovisason, Balduvian chieftain

data.name: Banners Raised
data.oracle_text: Creatures you control get +1/+0 until end of turn.
data.flavor_text: After the destruction of the Helvault, fearful mobs soon became fearless battalions.

data.name: Barge In
data.oracle_text: Target attacking creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn. Each attacking non-Human creature gains trample until end of turn.
data.flavor_text: The giant had heard of locks, but he had yet to discover a door he couldn't open.

data.name: Blazing Salvo
data.oracle_text: Blazing Salvo deals 3 damage to target creature unless that creature's controller has Blazing Salvo deal 5 damage to them.
data.flavor_text: Barbarians equate courage with the ability to endure pain.

data.name: Borrowed Hostility
data.oracle_text:
Escalate {3} (Pay this cost for each mode chosen beyond the first.)
Choose one or both —
• Target creature gets +3/+0 until end of turn.
• Target creature gains first strike until end of turn.

data.name: Brand
data.oracle_text:
Gain control of all permanents you own. (This effect lasts indefinitely.)
Cycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)
data.flavor_text:
"By this glyph I affirm your role."
—Urza, to Karn

data.name: Brightstone Ritual
data.oracle_text: Add {R} for each Goblin on the battlefield.
data.flavor_text: Wizards fought over the stone to exploit its power. Goblins fight over it because it's shiny.

data.name: Brute Force
data.oracle_text: Target creature gets +3/+3 until end of turn.
data.flavor_text: Blood, bone, and sinew are magnified, as is the rage that drives them. The brain, however, remains unchanged—a little bean, swinging by a strand in a cavernous, raving head.

data.name: Built to Smash
data.oracle_text: Target attacking creature gets +3/+3 until end of turn. If it's an artifact creature, it gains trample until end of turn.
data.flavor_text: Free from Consulate regulations, renegade-built automatons push performance to the limit.

data.name: Bull Rush
data.oracle_text: Target creature gets +2/+0 until end of turn.
data.flavor_text: "It's gone mad! Loose the chains and save what you can!"

data.name: Burst Lightning
data.oracle_text:
Kicker {4} (You may pay an additional {4} as you cast this spell.)
Burst Lightning deals 2 damage to any target. If this spell was kicked, it deals 4 damage instead.

data.name: Chandra's Defeat
data.oracle_text: Chandra's Defeat deals 5 damage to target red creature or red planeswalker. If that permanent is a Chandra planeswalker, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card.
data.flavor_text:
"Fire? Is that your only trick, Chandra?"
—Nicol Bolas

data.name: Chaos Charm
data.oracle_text:
Choose one —
• Destroy target Wall.
• Chaos Charm deals 1 damage to target creature.
• Target creature gains haste until end of turn.

data.name: Chaoslace
data.oracle_text: Target spell or permanent becomes red. (Its mana symbols remain unchanged.)

data.name: Collateral Damage
data.oracle_text:
As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature.
Collateral Damage deals 3 damage to any target.
data.flavor_text: It is much easier to create fire than to contain it.

data.name: Coming In Hot
data.oracle_text: Target creature gets +1/+0 and gains first strike until end of turn. Scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom.)
data.flavor_text: "I have a reckless idea," Koth offered. Chandra grinned and cracked her knuckles.

data.name: Coordinated Assault
data.oracle_text: Up to two target creatures each get +1/+0 and gain first strike until end of turn. (They deal combat damage before creatures without first strike.)
data.flavor_text: It's hard to shout "Shields up!" with a javelin in your chest.

data.name: Crimson Wisps
data.oracle_text:
Target creature becomes red and gains haste until end of turn. (It can attack and {T} this turn.)
Draw a card.
data.flavor_text: The whispers are incomprehensible, yet cinders always hear a message of urgency.

data.name: Crowd's Favor
data.oracle_text:
Convoke (Your creatures can help cast this spell. Each creature you tap while casting this spell pays for {1} or one mana of that creature's color.)
Target creature gets +1/+0 and gains first strike until end of turn. (It deals combat damage before creatures without first strike.)

data.name: Crush
data.oracle_text: Destroy target noncreature artifact.
data.flavor_text: A golem's hands know no tenderness.

data.name: Daring Escape
data.oracle_text: Target creature gets +1/+0 and gains first strike until end of turn. Scry 1.
data.flavor_text: As the Adversary's forces descended upon the gala, Elspeth whispered to Giada, "I can get you out of here, but we have to go now."

data.name: Death Spark
data.oracle_text:
Death Spark deals 1 damage to any target.
At the beginning of your upkeep, if this card is in your graveyard with a creature card directly above it, you may pay {1}. If you do, return this card to your hand.

data.name: Desperate Gambit
data.oracle_text: Choose a source you control and flip a coin. If you win the flip, the next time that source would deal damage this turn, it deals double that damage instead. If you lose the flip, the next time it would deal damage this turn, prevent that damage.

data.name: Dreadmaw's Ire
data.oracle_text: Until end of turn, target attacking creature gets +2/+2 and gains trample and "Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, destroy target artifact that player controls."
data.flavor_text:
"That's the fifth ship lost in three days! Can't we build them out of something stronger?"
—Malcolm Lee

data.name: Dual Shot
data.oracle_text: Dual Shot deals 1 damage to each of up to two target creatures.
data.flavor_text: "Through me the rage of Tilonalli burns twice as bright."

data.name: Dwarven Catapult
data.oracle_text: Dwarven Catapult deals X damage divided evenly, rounded down, among all creatures target opponent controls.
data.flavor_text:
"Often greatly outnumbered in battle, dwarves relied on catapults as one means of damaging a large army."
—*Sarpadian Empires, vol. IV*

data.name: Dwarven Song
data.oracle_text: One or more target creatures become red until end of turn.

data.name: Dynacharge
data.oracle_text:
Target creature you control gets +2/+0 until end of turn.
Overload {2}{R} (You may cast this spell for its overload cost. If you do, change "target" in its text to "each.")
data.flavor_text: Nothing evens the odds like a little lightning.

data.name: Electrickery
data.oracle_text:
Electrickery deals 1 damage to target creature you don't control.
Overload {1}{R} (You may cast this spell for its overload cost. If you do, change "target" in its text to "each.")

data.name: Electrostatic Bolt
data.oracle_text: Electrostatic Bolt deals 2 damage to target creature. If it's an artifact creature, Electrostatic Bolt deals 4 damage to it instead.
data.flavor_text: It's hard to avoid electric shock when the entire plane is metallic.

data.name: End-Blaze Epiphany
data.oracle_text: End-Blaze Epiphany deals X damage to target creature. When that creature dies this turn, exile a number of cards from the top of your library equal to its power, then choose a card exiled this way. Until the end of your next turn, you may play that card.

data.name: Engulfing Flames
data.oracle_text:
Engulfing Flames deals 1 damage to target creature. It can't be regenerated this turn.
Flashback {3}{R} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

data.name: Enrage
data.oracle_text: Target creature gets +X/+0 until end of turn.
data.flavor_text: The barbarians call it "touching the soul of the dragon."

data.name: Expedite
data.oracle_text:
Target creature gains haste until end of turn.
Draw a card.
data.flavor_text: "I run, and thunder follows."

data.name: Explosive Derailment
data.oracle_text:
Spree (Choose one or more additional costs.)
+ {2} — Explosive Derailment deals 4 damage to target creature.
+ {2} — Destroy target artifact.
data.flavor_text:
"BOMBS AND TRAINS AND SABOTAGE!"
—Breeches

data.name: Fall of the Titans
data.oracle_text:
Surge {X}{R} (You may cast this spell for its surge cost if you or a teammate has cast another spell this turn.)
Fall of the Titans deals X damage to each of up to two targets.
data.flavor_text: As Gideon kept the brood lineages at bay, Chandra incinerated the bound Eldrazi titans.

data.name: False Orders
data.oracle_text:
Cast this spell only during the declare blockers step.
Remove target creature defending player controls from combat. Creatures it was blocking that had become blocked by only that creature this combat become unblocked. You may have it block an attacking creature of your choice.

data.name: Feint
data.oracle_text: Tap all creatures blocking target attacking creature. Prevent all combat damage that would be dealt this turn by that creature and each creature blocking it.

data.name: Felonious Rage
data.oracle_text: Target creature you control gets +2/+0 and gains haste until end of turn. When that creature dies this turn, create a 2/2 white and blue Detective creature token.
data.flavor_text: It's hard to keep the peace if you can't even control your temper.

data.name: Fervent Strike
data.oracle_text: Target creature gets +1/+0 and gains first strike and haste until end of turn.
data.flavor_text:
"The flame paints a bright wheel on the sky, then shifts into a stabbing spark. The enemy falls; the smoke of victory rises."
—"Legends of the Firedancer"

data.name: Fever Charm
data.oracle_text:
Choose one —
• Target creature gains haste until end of turn.
• Target creature gets +2/+0 until end of turn.
• Fever Charm deals 3 damage to target Wizard creature.

data.name: Fiery Impulse
data.oracle_text:
Fiery Impulse deals 2 damage to target creature.
Spell mastery — If there are two or more instant and/or sorcery cards in your graveyard, Fiery Impulse deals 3 damage instead.
data.flavor_text: "Well, this got out of hand."

data.name: Fighting Chance
data.oracle_text: For each blocking creature, flip a coin. If you win the flip, prevent all combat damage that would be dealt by that creature this turn.
data.flavor_text: A stroke of luck can smite an army.

data.name: Firebending Lesson
data.oracle_text:
Kicker {4} (You may pay an additional {4} as you cast this spell.)
Firebending Lesson deals 2 damage to target creature. If this spell was kicked, it deals 5 damage to that creature instead.
data.flavor_text:
"Firebending is not something to fear, but if you don't respect it, it'll chew you up and spit you out."
—Zuko

data.name: Fire Magic
data.oracle_text:
Tiered (Choose one additional cost.)
• Fire — {0} — Fire Magic deals 1 damage to each creature.
• Fira — {2} — Fire Magic deals 2 damage to each creature.
• Firaga — {5} — Fire Magic deals 3 damage to each creature.

data.name: Firestorm
data.oracle_text:
As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard X cards.
Firestorm deals X damage to each of X targets.
data.flavor_text:
"Glok loved storms! He'd sit an' watch an' laugh through the whole thing. I miss him."
—Squee, goblin cabin hand

data.name: Flame-Blessed Bolt
data.oracle_text: Flame-Blessed Bolt deals 2 damage to target creature or planeswalker. If that creature or planeswalker would die this turn, exile it instead.
data.flavor_text:
"I noticed you were short on party favors, so I brought my own."
—Higa, slayer-captain of Gatstaf

data.name: Flame Discharge
data.oracle_text: Flame Discharge deals X damage to target creature or planeswalker. If you controlled a modified creature as you cast this spell, it deals X plus 2 damage instead. (Equipment, Auras you control, and counters are modifications.)
data.flavor_text: "What? Why would it need a cooling unit?"

data.name: Flaming Gambit
data.oracle_text:
Flaming Gambit deals X damage to target player or planeswalker. That player or that planeswalker's controller may choose a creature they control and have Flaming Gambit deal that damage to it instead.
Flashback {X}{R}{R} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

data.name: Flashback
data.oracle_text: Target instant or sorcery card in your graveyard gains flashback until end of turn. The flashback cost is equal to its mana cost. (You may cast that card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)
data.flavor_text: Quintorius found that every new discovery motivated him to keep exploring.

data.name: Flowstone Infusion
data.oracle_text: Target creature gets +2/-2 until end of turn.
data.flavor_text: The rumor that contact with flowstone would reveal Phyrexian sleeper agents was spread mostly by Phyrexian sleeper agents.

data.name: Frantic Confrontation
data.oracle_text: Target creature you control gets +X/+0 and gains first strike and trample until end of turn.
data.flavor_text:
"Enemies and traitors, all working together..."
—Azula

data.name: Free from Flesh
data.oracle_text: Target creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn. Put two oil counters on it.
data.flavor_text: He finally understood that phyresis was not an ending, but a new, perfect beginning.

data.name: Frost Bite
data.oracle_text: Frost Bite deals 2 damage to target creature or planeswalker. If you control three or more snow permanents, it deals 3 damage instead.
data.flavor_text:
"Don't wander far—it's a bit nippy out there!"
—Leidurr, expedition leader

data.name: Full Bore
data.oracle_text: Target creature you control gets +3/+2 until end of turn. If that creature was cast for its warp cost, it also gains trample and haste until end of turn.
data.flavor_text: The mining gear that crumbled their planet could also deal terrible damage to flesh.

data.name: Furious Resistance
data.oracle_text: Target blocking creature gets +3/+0 and gains first strike until end of turn.
data.flavor_text:
"At least the Gateless rebels have ideals. Rakdos just mocks, defiles, and kills all we hold dear."
—Libuse, Boros sergeant

data.name: Galvanic Blast
data.oracle_text:
Galvanic Blast deals 2 damage to any target.
Metalcraft — Galvanic Blast deals 4 damage instead if you control three or more artifacts.
data.flavor_text: Mirrodin has little weather, but it certainly has lightning.

data.name: Galvanic Bombardment
data.oracle_text: Galvanic Bombardment deals X damage to target creature, where X is 2 plus the number of cards named Galvanic Bombardment in your graveyard.
data.flavor_text: Geist-powered devices have no shortage of fuel.

data.name: Galvanic Discharge
data.oracle_text: Choose target creature or planeswalker. You get {E}{E}{E} (three energy counters), then you may pay any amount of {E}. Galvanic Discharge deals that much damage to that permanent.
data.flavor_text:
"Remember, if you find a rock making crackly noises, just put it back. Carefully."
—Bo, Great Desert prospector

data.name: Geistflame
data.oracle_text:
Geistflame deals 1 damage to any target.
Flashback {3}{R} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)
data.flavor_text: Innistrad pyromancers find their best raw materials in the fury of the dead.

data.name: Glyph of Destruction
data.oracle_text: Target blocking Wall you control gets +10/+0 until end of combat. Prevent all damage that would be dealt to it this turn. Destroy it at the beginning of the next end step.

data.name: Goblin Tutor
data.oracle_text:
Roll a six-sided die. If you roll a 1, Goblin Tutor has no effect. Otherwise, search your library for the indicated card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.
2 — A card named Goblin Tutor
3 — An enchantment
4 — An artifact
5 — A creature
6 — An instant or sorcery

data.name: Great Train Heist
data.oracle_text:
Spree (Choose one or more additional costs.)
+ {2}{R} — Untap all creatures you control. If it's your combat phase, there is an additional combat phase after this phase.
+ {2} — Creatures you control get +1/+0 and gain first strike until end of turn.
+ {R} — Choose target opponent. Whenever a creature you control deals combat damage to that player this turn, create a tapped Treasure token.

data.name: Gut Shot
data.oracle_text:
({R/P} can be paid with either {R} or 2 life.)
Gut Shot deals 1 damage to any target.
data.flavor_text:
"Down here, we have a more pointed version of the scriptures."
—Urabrask's enforcer

data.name: Guttural Response
data.oracle_text: Counter target blue instant spell.
data.flavor_text: A savage cry with the power to shatter minds.

data.name: Hearth Charm
data.oracle_text:
Choose one —
• Destroy target artifact creature.
• Attacking creatures get +1/+0 until end of turn.
• Target creature with power 2 or less can't be blocked this turn.

data.name: Heat Ray
data.oracle_text: Heat Ray deals X damage to target creature.
data.flavor_text:
"There was clearly a scream. I'm not sure if there was a mouth."
—Sachir, Akoum Expeditionary House

data.name: Heightened Reflexes
data.oracle_text: Target creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn. Put a first strike counter on it.
data.flavor_text: Some crystals glow in the presence of monsters, forming a convenient warning system. Some monsters have learned to outrun the light.

data.name: Hexgold Slash
data.oracle_text: Hexgold Slash deals 2 damage to target creature. If that creature has toxic, Hexgold Slash deals 4 damage to that creature instead.
data.flavor_text:
"No matter how tough they are, even Phyrexians prefer to keep their guts on the inside."
—Jor Kadeen

data.name: Huatli's Spurring
data.oracle_text: Target creature gets +2/+0 until end of turn. If you control a Huatli planeswalker, that creature gets +4/+0 until end of turn instead.
data.flavor_text: "Run like the wind, fierce one. The hunt has begun."

data.name: Incite
data.oracle_text: Target creature becomes red until end of turn and attacks this turn if able.
data.flavor_text: The veneer of rationality peeled from the mage, revealing the spite and rage beneath.

data.name: Inflame
data.oracle_text: Inflame deals 2 damage to each creature dealt damage this turn.
data.flavor_text: A Vulshok weapon strikes with the fire of the forge that made it.

data.name: Infuriate
data.oracle_text: Target creature gets +3/+2 until end of turn.
data.flavor_text:
"Renata launched a dozen arrows into the minotaur's thick hide, but the monster didn't slow its charge. The fury of Mogis was upon it."
—Luphea of Setessa, *Histories*

data.name: Into the Fray
data.oracle_text:
Target creature attacks this turn if able.
Splice onto Arcane {R} (As you cast an Arcane spell, you may reveal this card from your hand and pay its splice cost. If you do, add this card's effects to that spell.)

data.name: Kindled Fury
data.oracle_text: Target creature gets +1/+0 and gains first strike until end of turn. (It deals combat damage before creatures without first strike.)
data.flavor_text: "Fiends! Cowards! Your days of slaughtering innocents are done. It's time to face a real warrior!"

data.name: Kindled Heroism
data.oracle_text: Target creature gets +1/+0 and gains first strike until end of turn. Scry 1.
data.flavor_text: Even in the grip of Hylda's unnatural cold, something in Kellan felt bright as spring, something that poured into the empty hilts he'd been given by Talion and formed thorn-sharp blades of light.

data.name: Last-Ditch Effort
data.oracle_text: Sacrifice any number of creatures. Last-Ditch Effort deals that much damage to any target.
data.flavor_text:
"If you're gonna lose, at least make sure they don't win as much."
—Jula, goblin raider

data.name: Lava Dart
data.oracle_text:
Lava Dart deals 1 damage to any target.
Flashback—Sacrifice a Mountain. (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)
data.flavor_text:
"Small outbursts are healthy."
—Koth of the Hammer

data.name: Lightning Axe
data.oracle_text:
As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card or pay {5}.
Lightning Axe deals 5 damage to target creature.
data.flavor_text: Spirits disturbed by ghoulcallers become geists driven by restless anger.

data.name: Lightning Bolt
data.oracle_text: Lightning Bolt deals 3 damage to any target.
data.flavor_text: "I am the god of thunder, the lord of the savage lightning, and the very skies must tremble when speaks The Mighty Thor!"

data.name: Lunar Frenzy
data.oracle_text: Target creature you control gets +X/+0 and gains first strike and trample until end of turn.
data.flavor_text: In the adrenaline-fueled chaos, she hadn't even felt the bite.

data.name: Magma Spray
data.oracle_text: Magma Spray deals 2 damage to target creature. If that creature would die this turn, exile it instead.
data.flavor_text:
"Ashes can't be embalmed."
—Neheb, initiate of Ahn crop

data.name: Magnetic Theft

data.flavor_text: Among the Vulshok, the most prized blades are those that killed their original owners.

data.name: Make Your Mark
data.oracle_text: Target creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn. When that creature dies this turn, create a 3/2 red and white Spirit creature token.
data.flavor_text: Those who do learn from history may still choose to repeat it.

data.name: March of Reckless Joy
data.oracle_text:
As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may exile any number of red cards from your hand. This spell costs {2} less to cast for each card exiled this way.
Exile the top X cards of your library. You may play up to two of those cards until the end of your next turn.

data.name: Melt Through
data.oracle_text: Melt Through deals 2 damage to any target. If it's a creature, it perpetually gains "As long as this creature is on the battlefield, damage isn't removed from it during cleanup steps."

data.name: Might of the Meek
data.oracle_text:
Target creature gains trample until end of turn. It also gets +1/+0 until end of turn if you control a Mouse.
Draw a card.
data.flavor_text:
"Fear is unavoidable. You can run from it with your tail between your legs, or charge it head on with sword in hand. I prefer the latter."
—Rho, veteran hero

data.name: Monstrous Rage
data.oracle_text: Target creature gets +2/+0 until end of turn. Create a Monster Role token attached to it. (If you control another Role on it, put that one into the graveyard. Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 and has trample.)

"First it was plovers and mulldrifters. Now it's knitting needles the size of javelins."

"Push one goblin into sight, an' run a lot. That's tactics."
—Jula, goblin raider

data.oracle_text: Outnumber deals damage to target creature equal to the number of creatures you control.
data.flavor_text: Everyone who could still lift a weapon had a part in retaking Sea Gate.

Destroy target artifact if its mana value is 2 or less. If this spell was kicked, destroy that artifact if its mana value is 5 or less instead.

data.name: Pact of the Titan
data.oracle_text:
Create a 4/4 red Giant creature token.
At the beginning of your next upkeep, pay {4}{R}. If you don't, you lose the game.
data.flavor_text: Born of fire, destined for battle.

data.name: Panic
data.oracle_text:
Cast this spell only during combat before blockers are declared.
Target creature can't block this turn.
Draw a card at the beginning of the next turn's upkeep.
data.flavor_text:
"If you'd been there, you would've run from that deer, too!"
—Jaya Ballard, Task Mage

data.name: Pedal to the Metal
data.oracle_text: Target creature gets +X/+0 and gains first strike until end of turn.
data.flavor_text: In lieu of brakes, the Rocketeers installed a second accelerator pedal.

data.name: Play with Fire
data.oracle_text: Play with Fire deals 2 damage to any target. If a player is dealt damage this way, scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom.)
data.flavor_text: Devils find human dwellings to be oppressively cold, dark, and unburnt.

data.name: Precise Strike
data.oracle_text: Target creature gets +1/+0 and gains first strike until end of turn.
data.flavor_text: "Hit where it hurts, and always hit first."

data.name: Pyroblast
data.oracle_text:
Choose one —
• Counter target spell if it's blue.
• Destroy target permanent if it's blue.
data.flavor_text: Water can be crushing, but it is predictable. Fire is always dynamic, its rage absolute and all-consuming.

data.name: Quick Draw
data.oracle_text: Target creature you control gets +1/+1 and gains first strike until end of turn. Creatures target opponent controls lose first strike and double strike until end of turn.
data.flavor_text: The opening of the Omenpaths awoke the wild magic of Thunder Junction. Settlers dubbed it "thunder" and put it to use in everything from farming tools to deadly weapons.

data.name: Raze the Effigy
data.oracle_text:
Choose one —
• Destroy target artifact.
• Target attacking creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn.
data.flavor_text: The folk of Kessig build up their courage by burning effigies of the things they fear.

data.name: Reckless Rage
data.oracle_text: Reckless Rage deals 4 damage to target creature you don't control and 2 damage to target creature you control.
data.flavor_text: "Hard to starboard! Starb— Abandon ship! Abandon ship!"

data.name: Redcap Melee
data.oracle_text: Redcap Melee deals 4 damage to target creature or planeswalker. If a nonred permanent is dealt damage this way, you sacrifice a land.
data.flavor_text: At first, Syr Fenwick scoffed when he saw his opponents for the final match.

data.name: Red Elemental Blast
data.oracle_text:
Choose one —
• Counter target blue spell.
• Destroy target blue permanent.
data.flavor_text: Nothing restrains a burning passion.

data.name: Redirect Lightning
data.oracle_text:
As an additional cost to cast this spell, pay 5 life or pay {2}.
Change the target of target spell or ability with a single target.
data.flavor_text:
"A Waterbender lets their defense become their offense, turning their opponent's energy against them. I learned a way to do this with lightning."
—Iroh

data.name: Rending Volley
data.oracle_text:
This spell can't be countered.
Rending Volley deals 4 damage to target white or blue creature.
data.flavor_text: The sky offers few hiding places.

data.name: Ribald Shanty
data.oracle_text:
Starting intensity 2
Ribald Shanty deals damage equal to its intensity to target creature or planeswalker.
All Chorus cards you own intensify by 1.

data.name: Rites of Initiation
data.oracle_text: Discard any number of cards at random. Creatures you control get +1/+0 until end of turn for each card discarded this way.

data.name: Road Rage
data.oracle_text: Road Rage deals X damage to target creature or planeswalker, where X is 2 plus the number of Mounts and Vehicles you control.
data.flavor_text: Endriders learned the rules of the road on Gastal, which meant they didn't learn any rules at all.

data.name: Rock Slide
data.oracle_text: Rock Slide deals X damage divided as you choose among any number of target attacking or blocking creatures without flying.
data.flavor_text:
"Good ol' rock. Nothing beats rock."
—Rhirhok, goblin archer

data.name: Rouse the Mob
data.oracle_text:
Strive — This spell costs {2}{R} more to cast for each target beyond the first.
Any number of target creatures each get +2/+0 and gain trample until end of turn.

data.name: Rush of Adrenaline
data.oracle_text: Target creature gets +2/+1 and gains trample until end of turn.
data.flavor_text: Scarecrows only go so far in sending the message to stay away.

data.name: Rush the Room
data.oracle_text: Target creature gets +1/+0 and gains first strike until end of turn. If it's a Goblin or Orc, it also gains haste until end of turn.
data.set_name: The Lord of the Rings: Tales of Middle-earth
data.flavor_text: There was a horn-blast and a rush of feet, and Orcs one after another leaped into the chamber.

data.name: Samut's Sprint
data.oracle_text: Target creature gets +2/+1 and gains haste until end of turn. Scry 1.
data.flavor_text: Samut's war was intensely personal. Every hour she faced enemies she once loved as friends and horrors she once revered as gods.

data.name: Scar
data.oracle_text: Put a -1/-1 counter on target creature.
data.flavor_text:
"What is a scar? A sign of courage in the face of danger? A mere trick of flesh? Or a constant reminder of agonizing pain, and the follies of war."
—Illulia of Nighthearth

data.name: Scorching Winds
data.oracle_text:
Cast this spell only during the declare attackers step and only if you've been attacked this step.
Scorching Winds deals 1 damage to each attacking creature.

data.name: Searing Touch
data.oracle_text:
Buyback {4} (You may pay an additional {4} as you cast this spell. If you do, put this card into your hand as it resolves.)
Searing Touch deals 1 damage to any target.

data.name: Shard Volley
data.oracle_text:
As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a land.
Shard Volley deals 3 damage to any target.
data.flavor_text: "Let the mountain's teeth pierce our oppressors."

data.name: Shellshock
data.oracle_text: For each opponent, choose up to one target creature that player controls. Shellshock deals X damage to each of those creatures. You create a Mutagen token for each creature dealt damage this way. (They're artifacts with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.")

data.name: Shivan Fire
data.oracle_text:
Kicker {4} (You may pay an additional {4} as you cast this spell.)
Shivan Fire deals 2 damage to target creature. If this spell was kicked, it deals 4 damage instead.
data.flavor_text: Sometimes Shivan dragons toy with their food. Other times they just cook it.

data.name: Shock
data.oracle_text: Shock deals 2 damage to any target.
data.flavor_text: If you're going to have a gimmick, embrace it.

data.name: Shower of Sparks
data.oracle_text: Shower of Sparks deals 1 damage to target creature and 1 damage to target player or planeswalker.
data.flavor_text: The viashino had learned how to operate the rig through trial and error—mostly error.

data.name: Singe
data.oracle_text: Singe deals 1 damage to target creature. That creature becomes black until end of turn.
data.flavor_text: Burnt flesh. Blackened soul.

data.name: Skred
data.oracle_text: Skred deals damage to target creature equal to the number of snow permanents you control.
data.flavor_text:
"This close to Rimewind Keep, no avalanche is nature's doing."
—Ukoten, centaur chieftain

data.name: Smelt
data.oracle_text: Destroy target artifact.
data.flavor_text: The creation of new weapons demands the destruction of others.

data.name: Sonic Seizure
data.oracle_text:
As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card at random.
Sonic Seizure deals 3 damage to any target.

data.name: Spark Jolt
data.oracle_text: Spark Jolt deals 1 damage to any target. Scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom.)
data.flavor_text: Acolytes of Purphoros hammer the world until they see the sparks of change.

data.name: Spark Spray
data.oracle_text:
Spark Spray deals 1 damage to any target.
Cycling {R} ({R}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)
data.flavor_text: "You see this rock-grinder? One step closer and it'll be a face-grinder!"

data.name: Spellchain Scatter
data.oracle_text:
Kicker {U}
When you next cast an instant or sorcery spell this turn, conjure a duplicate of that spell into your hand. If this spell wasn't kicked, discard the duplicate at the beginning of your next end step.

card_faces.name: Spikefield Hazard
card_faces.oracle_text: Spikefield Hazard deals 1 damage to any target. If a permanent dealt damage this way would die this turn, exile it instead.
card_faces.flavor_text:
"Stop screaming! You'll only bring down more spikes."
—Raff Slugeater, goblin shortcutter

card_faces.name: Spikefield Cave
card_faces.flavor_text:
"Silence until we're through. Even a whisper's echo can dislodge death from above."
—Raff Slugeater, goblin shortcutter

data.name: Stonesplitter Bolt
data.oracle_text:
Bargain (You may sacrifice an artifact, enchantment, or token as you cast this spell.)
Stonesplitter Bolt deals X damage to target creature or planeswalker. If this spell was bargained, it deals twice X damage to that permanent instead.

data.name: Storm Strike
data.oracle_text: Target creature gets +1/+0 and gains first strike until end of turn. Scry 1.
data.flavor_text: "My shout is thunder and my fist is lightning!"

data.name: Street Spasm
data.oracle_text:
Street Spasm deals X damage to target creature without flying you don't control.
Overload {X}{X}{R}{R} (You may cast this spell for its overload cost. If you do, change "target" in its text to "each.")

data.name: Surge of Zeal
data.oracle_text: Radiance — Target creature and each other creature that shares a color with it gain haste until end of turn.
data.flavor_text:
"If only my poxes were as infectious as their zealotry."
—Savra

data.name: Tarfire
data.oracle_text: Tarfire deals 2 damage to any target.
data.flavor_text:
"After Auntie brushed the soot from her eyes, she discovered something wonderful: the fire had turned the goat into something that smelled delicious."
—A tale of Auntie Grub

data.name: Telim'Tor's Edict
data.oracle_text:
Exile target permanent you own or control.
Draw a card at the beginning of the next turn's upkeep.
data.flavor_text:
"Execution awaits the dissenter."
—Kasib ibn Naji, *Letters*

data.name: Thunder Magic
data.oracle_text:
Tiered (Choose one additional cost.)
• Thunder — {0} — Thunder Magic deals 2 damage to target creature.
• Thundara — {3} — Thunder Magic deals 4 damage to target creature.
• Thundaga — {5}{R} — Thunder Magic deals 8 damage to target creature.

data.name: Timecrafting
data.oracle_text:
Choose one —
• Remove X time counters from target permanent or suspended card.
• Put X time counters on target permanent with a time counter on it or suspended card.
data.flavor_text: Oddly, an unstable time stream makes wizards want to tinker with it even more.

data.name: Titan's Strength
data.oracle_text: Target creature gets +3/+1 until end of turn. Scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom.)
data.flavor_text: "One last push, and then my task is done."

data.name: Torch Breath
data.oracle_text:
This spell costs {2} less to cast if it targets a blue permanent.
This spell can't be countered.
Torch Breath deals X damage to target creature or planeswalker.
data.flavor_text: "Fried squid, comin' up!"

data.name: Torch the Tower
data.oracle_text:
Bargain (You may sacrifice an artifact, enchantment, or token as you cast this spell.)
Torch the Tower deals 2 damage to target creature or planeswalker. If this spell was bargained, instead it deals 3 damage to that permanent and you scry 1.
If a permanent dealt damage by Torch the Tower would die this turn, exile it instead.

data.name: Tunnel
data.oracle_text: Destroy target Wall. It can't be regenerated.

data.name: Turn Inside Out
data.oracle_text: Target creature gets +3/+0 until end of turn. When it dies this turn, manifest dread. (Look at the top two cards of your library. Put one onto the battlefield face down as a 2/2 creature and the other into your graveyard. Turn it face up any time for its mana cost if it's a creature card.)
data.flavor_text: "Scared, are you? Need a hug?"

data.name: Unholy Heat
data.oracle_text:
Unholy Heat deals 2 damage to target creature or planeswalker.
Delirium — Unholy Heat deals 6 damage instead if there are four or more card types among cards in your graveyard.
data.flavor_text: "The devils use fire. Why shouldn't we?"

data.name: Unnatural Speed
data.oracle_text: Target creature gains haste until end of turn.
data.flavor_text:
"How can we hope to match the speed of lightning? The fury of storms? The power of mountains? The answer is simple. We cannot. I advise against this war."
—Sensei Hisoka, letter to Lord Konda

data.name: Unstable Footing
data.oracle_text:
Kicker {3}{R} (You may pay an additional {3}{R} as you cast this spell.)
Damage can't be prevented this turn. If this spell was kicked, it deals 5 damage to target player or planeswalker.
data.flavor_text: A long way down is shorter than you think.

data.name: Vertigo
data.oracle_text: Vertigo deals 2 damage to target creature with flying. That creature loses flying until end of turn.
data.flavor_text:
"I saw the wizard gesturing, but I didn't guess his plan until my aesthir cried out and went into a dive."
—Arna Kennerüd, skyknight

data.name: Violent Urge
data.oracle_text:
Target creature gets +1/+0 and gains first strike until end of turn.
Delirium — If there are four or more card types among cards in your graveyard, that creature gains double strike until end of turn.
data.flavor_text: Rage can be a potent antidote to fear.

data.name: Voltage Surge
data.oracle_text:
As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may sacrifice an artifact.
Voltage Surge deals 2 damage to target creature or planeswalker. If this spell's additional cost was paid, Voltage Surge deals 4 damage instead.

data.name: Weapon Surge
data.oracle_text:
Target creature you control gets +1/+0 and gains first strike until end of turn.
Overload {1}{R} (You may cast this spell for its overload cost. If you do, change "target" in its text to "each.")

data.name: Weight of Spires
data.oracle_text: Weight of Spires deals damage to target creature equal to the number of nonbasic lands that creature's controller controls.
data.flavor_text:
"Finally, a good use for an Azorius courthouse."
—Ghut Rak, Gruul guildmage

data.name: Wild Slash
data.oracle_text:
Ferocious — If you control a creature with power 4 or greater, damage can't be prevented this turn.
Wild Slash deals 2 damage to any target.
data.flavor_text: Never mistake deception for cleverness.
